cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)

file(GLOB_RECURSE noise_src 
    "src/protocol/*.c" 
    "src/crypto/aes/*.c"
    "src/crypto/blake2/*.c"
    "src/crypto/chacha/*.c"
    "src/crypto/donna/*.c"
    "src/crypto/ed25519/*.c"
    "src/crypto/ghash/*.c"
    "src/crypto/sha2/*.c"
    "src/backend/ref/*.c"
)

# Exclude fuzz and test files
list(FILTER noise_src EXCLUDE REGEX "test|fuzz")
list(FILTER noise_src EXCLUDE REGEX "rand_sodium.c")
list(FILTER noise_src EXCLUDE REGEX "donna-c64")

idf_component_register(
    SRCS ${noise_src}
    INCLUDE_DIRS "include" "src/protocol" "src" "src/backend/ref"
    REQUIRES mbedtls
)

target_compile_definitions(${COMPONENT_LIB} PRIVATE 
    HAVE_STDINT_H=1
    HAVE_STRING_H=1
    HAVE_STDLIB_H=1
    USE_MBEDTLS=1
    ED25519_CUSTOMRANDOM=1
    ED25519_REFHASH=1
)

target_compile_options(${COMPONENT_LIB} PRIVATE
    -Wno-implicit-fallthrough
)
